question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists a series of activities with dates rather than the main sections or chapters of the thesis. It does not provide any chapter titles or an outline of the thesis structure.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of the contents of each section or chapter. The entries are task-oriented and lack explanatory content about what each part of the thesis will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: Because the text only contains a timetable of tasks, it does not convey the overall structure or logical flow of the thesis. A reader cannot deduce how the thesis is organized from this information.
